mapper.sql: project_id, scheme_id, scheme_code, scheme_name, project_code, project_name, project_type, industry, region, plan_year, proposed_amount, invested_amount, budget_amount, progress_rate, benefit_score, priority, attachments, project_status, process_instance_id, leader_id, leader_name, dept_id, setup_time, expected_exit_time, actual_exit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invest_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM invest_project WHERE scheme_id = #{schemeId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC, project_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invest_project ( scheme_id, scheme_code, scheme_name, project_code, project_name, project_type, industry, region, plan_year, proposed_amount, invested_amount, budget_amount, progress_rate, benefit_score, priority, attachments, project_status, process_instance_id, leader_id, leader_name, dept_id, setup_time, expected_exit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{schemeId}, #{schemeCode}, #{schemeName}, #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectType}, #{industry}, #{region}, #{planYear}, #{proposedAmount}, #{investedAmount}, #{budgetAmount}, #{progressRate}, #{benefitScore}, #{priority}, #{attachments}, #{projectStatus}, #{processInstanceId}, #{leaderId}, #{leaderName}, #{deptId}, #{setupTime}, #{expectedExitTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE invest_project
scheme_id = #{schemeId}, scheme_code = #{schemeCode}, scheme_name = #{schemeName}, project_code = #{projectCode}, project_name = #{projectName}, project_type = #{projectType}, industry = #{industry}, region = #{region}, plan_year = #{planYear}, proposed_amount = #{proposedAmount}, invested_amount = #{investedAmount}, budget_amount = #{budgetAmount}, progress_rate = #{progressRate}, benefit_score = #{benefitScore}, priority = #{priority}, attachments = #{attachments}, project_status = #{projectStatus}, process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, leader_id = #{leaderId}, leader_name = #{leaderName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, setup_time = #{setupTime}, expected_exit_time = #{expectedExitTime}, actual_exit_time = #{actualExitTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE invest_project SET del_flag = '2' WHERE project_id = #{projectId}

UPDATE invest_project SET del_flag = '2' WHERE project_id IN
#{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invest_project WHERE process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId} AND del_flag = '0'
